notes.body: Upload the receipt for 6/30's business to the portal as soon as possible.

1954 Shout Out — Big Shout Out to Cooper at Jeffersonville on his first day, crushing the Halo Effect and engaging guests in the dining room. Let's Go! Standing: Power of One — Ops Manual is single source of truth; develop two future GMs/year, min six Shift Leaders; Halo Effect + Suggestive Selling; 100% shops are attainable.

Calibration for shift leads (Teams meeting) — Anthony Pirtle, Rusul Kadhim, Madilyn Smith. RESOLVED: Reoccurring Issues 2065 — trash removal is included in the rent (confirmed with Pam), no separate bill. Standing KPI Ranking — 60% of score = Secret Shop + Customer complaints + Ticket times.
KY-2065 open tasks (7/01): L-Rev (Labor Review) and VO-Rec-BOSS: Alpha – Ohio Valley. Clear both in CrunchTime. Weekly sales W/E Jul 5: $12,697 vs LY $11,580 = +9.6%. COGS CP% 33.8%.
New hire Megan Kurschner processed and good to schedule. Added to employee directory (phone pending). Active count 30 to 31.

New shop 6/25 (Dinner) scored 100% — third straight perfect shop. On shift: Bobby Cline, Francisco Llorente Mejias, Jeremiah Matthews, Madison Cureton, Maylin Hernandez Rodriguez, Richard Gibbs. Store YTD 85.3% (37 shops).
